title: Add request timing middleware
description: Create middleware in `src/middleware/request-timing.ts` that measures request duration and adds `X-Response-Time` header with duration in milliseconds. Include co-located integration test in `request-timing.test.ts`.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts — NextRequest/NextResponse middleware factory pattern with `middleware(request: NextRequest): NextResponse` signature, config object pattern, excludePaths support, fake timers in tests
